title: createSelector
description: Creates an O(2) selection signal. Only the previous and new selection re-evaluate.
signature: createSelector<T, U = T>(source: Accessor<T>, fn?: (a: U, b: T) => boolean): (key: U) => boolean
param_source_desc: Signal that holds the currently selected value.
returns_body: A function <0>(key: U) => boolean</0> that returns <1>true</1> if <2>key</2> matches the current selection. Only the previously selected and newly selected items re-evaluate. O(2) regardless of list size.
